LSE-HS9-L2-300650-HSVPA910-MEC-IMR-01 • HS Visual & Performing Arts (Theatre): Grades 9-10 • Script Analysis for Believable Character

The Recipe Card

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the boy telling the girl to do?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for what the boy says at the end. Why does he tell the girl to choose the thing he picks?
